title: Gambling Change Persons and Booth Cashiers
description: Exchange coins, tokens, and chips for patrons' money. May issue payoffs and obtain customer's signature on receipt. May operate a booth in the slot machine area and furnish change persons with money bank at the start of the shift, or count and audit money in drawers.

tasks.text: Keep accurate records of monetary exchanges, authorization forms, and transaction reconciliations.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Exchange money, credit, tickets, or casino chips and make change for customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Count money and audit money drawers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Check identifications to verify age of players.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain cage security according to rules.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Reconcile daily summaries of transactions to balance books.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain customers' signatures on receipts when winnings exceed the amount held in a slot machine.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Calculate the value of chips won or lost by players.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Accept credit applications and verify credit references to provide check-cashing authorization or to establish house credit accounts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Furnish change persons with a money bank at the start of each shift.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Listen for jackpot alarm bells and issue payoffs to winners.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sell gambling chips, tokens, or tickets to patrons, or to other workers for resale to patrons.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
